description_long: This is a set of three adjacent two-story houses, each with a gable roof and surrounded by a low hedge and a paved sidewalk. The houses feature a mix of dark and light exterior facades, with the central house displaying a brick finish and the others in dark siding. The front yards are landscaped with small trees and shrubs, and each house has a distinct entryway with steps leading up to the door. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and there are visible garages and driveways for each unit. A blue car is parked on the street, and the rear yards are enclosed with greenery, providing private outdoor spaces.
description: A row of three two-story gable-roofed houses with brick and dark siding, landscaped yards, and symmetrical window arrangements, set behind a low hedge and sidewalk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three houses with their main entryways, steps, garages, and a blue car parked on the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, the rear yards, and the alignment of the houses along the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, private gardens, and the hedge enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyards, additional landscaping, and the alignment of the houses from the rear.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front doors with steps, small porches, and minimal decorative elements
